site.tagline: All the memes. In one place.
site.description: The largest community meme repository. Thousands of memes in JPG/PNG, uploaded by the people for the people. Search, download and share the best memes.
site.keywords: memes, funny, reddit, humor, argentina, viral

hero.sub: Browse, search and share the best memes from the internet.

footer.tagline: All the memes. In one place.

sidebar.upload_copy: Have a meme to share? Upload it to OpenMeme.

terminos.meta_description: Terms and Conditions for using OpenMeme. Learn about your rights and obligations when using our meme platform.
terminos.title: Terms and Conditions
terminos.acceptance_body: By accessing or using OpenMeme, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our platform. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time, and continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terminos.conduct_body: You agree to use OpenMeme only for lawful purposes. You must not: (a) upload any content that violates applicable laws or regulations; (b) upload content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable; (c) impersonate any person or entity; (d) attempt to disrupt the platform's operation or security; (e) scrape, crawl, or otherwise systematically extract data from the platform without our prior written consent.
terminos.ownership_body: Users retain ownership of the memes and content they upload to OpenMeme. By uploading content, you grant OpenMeme a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to display, distribute, and perform the content on our platform and its promotional channels. This license ends when you delete your content from the platform, subject to reasonable cache and backup retention periods.
terminos.dmca_body: OpenMeme respects the intellectual property rights of others. If you believe that any content on our platform infringes your copyright, please refer to our <dmcaLink>DMCA Policy</dmcaLink> for instructions on submitting a takedown notice.
terminos.liability_body: OpenMeme is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the platform's operation or availability. To the fullest extent permitted by law, OpenMeme shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the platform.
terminos.governing_law_body: These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Argentine Republic. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved in the courts of the City of Buenos Aires.
terminos.contact_body: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at support@openmeme.io or through our <contactLink>Contact page</contactLink>.

privacidad.meta_description: OpenMeme's Privacy Policy. Learn about how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacidad.title: Privacy Policy
privacidad.info_collected_body: We collect information you provide directly, such as when you contact us. We also automatically collect certain information when you use OpenMeme, including your IP address, browser type, operating system, referring URLs, and usage data through cookies and similar technologies.
privacidad.cookies_body: OpenMeme uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve your experience, analyze usage, and provide personalized content. We use PostHog for product analytics and may use other third-party analytics services. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacidad.third_party_body: OpenMeme uses third-party services for hosting, content delivery (CDN), analytics, and email communications. These services may have access to your data solely for the purpose of performing their functions and are contractually obligated to protect your information.
privacidad.sharing_body: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your information: (a) with your consent; (b) to comply with legal obligations; (c) to protect our rights and property; (d) in connection with a business transfer; or (e) with service providers who help us operate the platform.
privacidad.user_rights_body: You have the right to: (a) access your personal information; (b) correct inaccurate data; (c) request deletion of your data; (d) restrict or object to processing; (e) data portability; and (f) withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, please contact us.
privacidad.retention_body: We retain your personal information only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, or as required by applicable law. When we no longer need your information, we will securely delete or anonymize it.
privacidad.security_body: OpenMeme implements reasonable technical and organizational security measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure.
privacidad.contact_body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at support@openmeme.io or through our <contactLink>Contact page</contactLink>.

dmca.meta_description: OpenMeme's DMCA and Copyright policy. Learn how to report copyright infringement and submit takedown notices.
dmca.title: DMCA / Copyright Policy
dmca.designated_agent_body: OpenMeme's designated agent for notice of claimed infringement under the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) can be reached at:
dmca.notification_body: If you believe that material available on OpenMeme infringes a copyright you own or control, please submit a written notification to our designated agent that includes substantially the following: (a) a physical or electronic signature of the copyright owner or authorized representative; (b) identification of the copyrighted work claimed to have been infringed; (c) identification of the material that is claimed to be infringing, with enough detail for us to locate it; (d) your name, address, telephone number, and email address; (e) a statement that you have a good faith belief that the use is not authorized by the copyright owner; and (f) a statement that the information in the notification is accurate and, under penalty of perjury, that you are authorized to act on behalf of the copyright owner.
dmca.counter_notice_body: If you believe that material you posted was removed by mistake or misidentification, you may submit a counter-notice containing: (a) your physical or electronic signature; (b) identification of the material that was removed and where it was located; (c) a statement under penalty of perjury that you have a good faith belief the material was removed as a result of mistake or misidentification; (d) your name, address, and telephone number; and (e) a statement that you consent to jurisdiction of the federal district court for the judicial district where your address is located.
dmca.repeat_infringer_body: OpenMeme will terminate, in appropriate circumstances, the accounts of users who are repeat infringers of copyright. We reserve the right to remove content and terminate accounts at our discretion.
dmca.contact_note: For any questions regarding this DMCA policy, please contact us through our <contactLink>Contact page</contactLink>.

contacto.meta_description: Get in touch with OpenMeme. Reach out to our team for support, inquiries, or feedback.
contacto.title: Contact Us
contacto.description: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question, feedback, or need support, we're here to help.
contacto.response_time: We typically respond within 24–48 hours during business days.
contacto.legal_note: For copyright or DMCA inquiries, please visit our <dmcaLink>DMCA page</dmcaLink>.
